work_unit: 瞭望轮#48:origin同步+worktree状态核查(卡死保护续)
situation: audit-cycle-state.status=fix-in-progress,9 pending derived_fixes全BLOCKED on human merge。前一轮#47报告behind=9/ahead=1/origin_diff=0。本轮目标:确认origin/main是否推进、worktree behind数字是否因新state commit再膨胀、卡死保护是否仍需维持。
action: 跑scout-scan拿快照→git fetch origin/main→对比local vs origin HEAD→检查9 worktree分支behind/ahead/origin_sync三维状态→发现local领先origin 10个commit(全是引擎state回写)→执行git push origin main同步远端(cp-guard允许state.md/case JSON直提main)→验证push后9 worktree behind统一降为1(仅差本次即将提交的state commit)、ahead=10、origin_diff=0已同步。未触发任何源码改动或rebase,严守卡死保护纪律。
outcome_evidence: git push origin main输出'9ea7878..b9f7d19 main -> main'确认10个local-only state commits已同步;for循环验证9 worktree分支全部behind=1/ahead=10/origin_diff=0;scout-scan显示dirty=9,pending worktree=10待合并;无源码文件被修改(git diff HEAD~1 --name-only仅.claude/*)。
next_suggestion: BLOCKED on human merge:9 pending fix worktree (case-494/495/496/497/498/499/500/519/502) 均merge-ready via squash,behind=1仅差本轮state commit,请用户审阅diff后批量merge以解除audit-cycle阻塞
若用户本周仍无法merge,考虑在下轮瞭望时归档本批case JSON以减少.claude/decisions/目录体积(已累积560条)
